auth_notes: Authentication is handled via an 'X-API-KEY' header. The key is generated within the TaxDome portal under Settings > API.
rate_limits: 10 requests per second per API key.
gotchas: Webhooks are limited to specific events like 'Job Status Change' and may require manual setup for each pipeline.
The API uses specific internal IDs for custom fields which requires an initial 'GET' request to map fields correctly.
File uploads via API require handling multipart/form-data which can be tricky in the HTTP Request node.
client_must_provide: List of Pipeline and Stage IDs for automation mapping
research_notes: The integration will rely heavily on the HTTP Request node. Users should create a 'Header Auth' credential in n8n for the X-API-KEY. Webhooks must be configured manually in the TaxDome UI to point to the n8n production URL. For document management, the 'Send Binary Data' option in the HTTP node will be necessary.

effort_recommendation.rationale: The integration will rely heavily on the HTTP Request node. Users should create a 'Header Auth' credential in n8n for the X-API-KEY. Webhooks must be configured manually in the TaxDome UI to point to the n8n production URL. For document management, the 'Send Binary Data' option in the HTTP node will be necessary.
